hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('file_path',''); exit(0 if f.endswith('page.tsx') else 1)" 2>/dev/null; then SKILL="/Users/meganharrison/Documents/alleato-pm/.claude/skills/create-page/SKILL.md"; [ -f "$SKILL" ] && echo "=== create-page skill injected ==="  && cat "$SKILL"; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'supabase/migrations'; then echo '⚠️ Migration file changed — run `npm run db:types` to regenerate database types'; fi
